course_title: MEET YOUR SOIL: SOIL ANALYSIS AND INTERPRETATION LABORATORY
description: Hands-on laboratory on soil analysis and interpretation of soil properties for different uses, such as food production, waste management, water quality, stormwater control, and environmental sustainability.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (GEOG/​ENVIR ST/​SOIL SCI  230orSOIL SCI 301, or concurrent enrollment) or graduate/professional standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (GEOG/​ENVIR ST/​SOIL SCI  230orSOIL SCI 301, or concurrent enrollment) or graduate/professional standing
